record_types.name: cpSpaceDebugDrawOptions

access_types.name: cpCollisionBeginFunc
access_types.code:
type cpCollisionBeginFunc is
  access function
    (arb : cpArbiter; space : cpSpace; userData : cpDataPointer)
     return cpBool
with Convention => C;

access_types.name: cpCollisionPostSolveFunc
access_types.code:
type cpCollisionPostSolveFunc is
  access procedure
    (arb : cpArbiter; space : cpSpace; userData : cpDataPointer)
with Convention => C;

access_types.name: cpCollisionPreSolveFunc
access_types.code:
type cpCollisionPreSolveFunc is
  access function

     return cpBool
with Convention => C;

access_types.name: cpCollisionSeparateFunc
access_types.code:
type cpCollisionSeparateFunc is
  access procedure
    (arb : cpArbiter; space : cpSpace; userData : cpDataPointer)
with Convention => C;

access_types.name: cpPostStepFunc
access_types.code:
type cpPostStepFunc is
  access procedure
    (space : cpSpace; key : System.Address; data : System.Address)
with Convention => C;
